task_description: Implement the complete MBG (Mamba Based Graph) model codebase with all necessary modules, graph attention layers, GEM blocks, and utilities following the architecture documented in README.md and matching the interface conventions of CBraMod/EEGMamba reference implementations.

verification.summary: All verification tests pass: (1) models/mbg.py __main__ forward pass OK, (2) All imports succeed, (3) Shape assertion (2,22,4,200)->(2,22,4,200) passes, (4) model_for_tuab classifier head works correctly (output shape [B]), (5) utils (electrode_positions, graph_utils BFS/DFS) all work, (6) Multiple input configurations tested: (2,22,4,200), (1,19,10,200), (4,22,1,200) all produce correct output shapes. Parameter count ~3M for n_layer=4, estimated ~9M for n_layer=12.
